description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, segmented roof featuring a central raised skylight or ventilation structure. The facade is characterized by clean white walls, large rectangular windows arranged in horizontal rows, and black metal railings on the balconies. The main entrance is centrally located and flanked by symmetrical window placements, with a small set of steps leading up from the sidewalk. The property is bordered by a low retaining wall and includes a curved patch of green landscaping at one corner. The house sits adjacent to a paved street, suggesting an urban or suburban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat segmented roof, white facade, large windows, and black railings, set beside a street with a small landscaped area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, balconies with black railings, and a curved landscaped area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain white wall with minimal windows and the continuation of the retaining wall and street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows and balconies, with the flat roof and central skylight visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain wall, the segmented roof, and the edge of the landscaped area.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with steps, flanked by windows and protected by a small overhang, with black metal railings on adjacent balconies.
